endpoints.name: Lists all of the available Service Fabric resource provider API operations.
endpoints.description: Get the list of available Service Fabric resource provider API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Gets the list of Service Fabric cluster resources created in the specified subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets all Service Fabric cluster resources created or in the process of being created in the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets the list of Service Fabric cluster code versions available for the specified location.
endpoints.description: Gets all available code versions for Service Fabric cluster resources by location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Gets information about a Service Fabric cluster code version available in the specified location.
endpoints.description: Gets information about an available Service Fabric cluster code version.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{CLUSTERVERSION}} with a real clusterversion.

endpoints.name: Gets the list of Service Fabric cluster code versions available for the specified environment.
endpoints.description: Gets all available code versions for Service Fabric cluster resources by environment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{ENVIRONMENT}} with a real environment.

endpoints.name: Gets information about a Service Fabric cluster code version available for the specified environment.
endpoints.description: Gets information about an available Service Fabric cluster code version by environment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{CLUSTERVERSION}} with a real clusterversion. Replace {{ENVIRONMENT}} with a real environment.

endpoints.name: Gets a Service Fabric cluster resource.
endpoints.description: Get a Service Fabric cluster resource created or in the process of being created in the specified resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a Service Fabric cluster resource.
endpoints.description: Create or update a Service Fabric cluster resource with the specified name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: Deletes a Service Fabric cluster resource.
endpoints.description: Delete a Service Fabric cluster resource with the specified name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: Updates the configuration of a Service Fabric cluster resource.
endpoints.description: Update the configuration of a Service Fabric cluster resource with the specified name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: Gets the list of Service Fabric cluster resources created in the specified resource group.
endpoints.description: Gets all Service Fabric cluster resources created or in the process of being created in the resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
